MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-12-2011 IN 206, DEFENDANT ATLAS TOWING SERVICES INC'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL ARGUED. THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 5/2/11 IS CONTINUED TO 7/11/11 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED, AND THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. DISCOVERY AND PRE-TRIAL DEADLINES ARE TO TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
